name: Chicken'n Hash Brown Bake
recipeIngredient: 32 oz. pkg. southern style hash browns
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare hash browns by thawing overnight in the refrigerator.
2. Layer hash browns in an ungreased 9 x 13 pan.
3. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the hash browns.
4. Place chicken and mushrooms on top of the hash browns.
5. In a bowl, mix together sour cream, broth, soup, bouillon, onions, red peppers, and garlic until combined.
6. Pour the mixture evenly over the hash browns.
7. Sprinkle paprika and almonds over the top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes or until heated through.
